text_block_list.text:
After training for the day, Biwa Hayahide and I
start tidying up when someone catches her
attention...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? Taishin! Are you done for the day too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm just taking a break. I still have a little more to
do.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You can't be serious. It's already dark. Resting up
for the next day is just as important as—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Leave me alone. I don't need your nagging. I
know what I'm doing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The nerve! As her friend and rival, how can I just
leave her be?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm worried about Taishin. Would it be all
right if I train with her for a while?
choice_data_list: You should have more faith in your rival.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm worried about Taishin. Would it be all
right if I train with her for a while?
choice_data_list: You should have more faith in your rival.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I really appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Hold on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You wanna train together? Why? Didn't you just
say you were done for the day?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Watching you made me want to run more myself.
Please, can't I join you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, fine. It's not like you'll take no for an
answer, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Don't blame me if you're tired tomorrow.

They spend the evening training together until
just before curfew.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm... I guess you're right.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's not like we can both come in first
place. All of us are training to win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The best thing I can do is go home and take care
of myself, then.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I have to be in top condition to compete with her,
after all!

With that, Biwa Hayahide watches her rival go off
to train alone as she returns to her dorm.
